name: Shelcal / Calcimax
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Provides elemental calcium for bone mineralization, nerve conduction, and muscle function. Vitamin D3 component enhances intestinal calcium absorption.
food_interactions: Take with meals for better absorption
Avoid spinach, rhubarb, bran around dose time (reduce calcium absorption)
what_to_avoid: Split dose if taking more than 500mg elemental calcium at a time
Many interactions — take 2h away from most medications
